entities.name: KRISHNA RIVER BASIN
entities.description: The geographical area where spatio-temporal cropland changes are being mapped.

entities.name: WATER STRESS
entities.description: The environmental stressor causing changes in cropland within the Krishna River Basin.

entities.name: TEMPORAL SATELLITE DATA
entities.description: The data source used to map and analyze spatio-temporal cropland changes.

entities.name: SPATIO-TEMPORAL CROPLAND CHANGES
entities.description: The variation in cropland area and distribution over time and space.

entities.name: NATURAL HAZARDS
entities.description: Climatic or geological events that cause loss of life, crop failure, and ecosystem destruction.

entities.name: DROUGHTS
entities.description: A type of natural hazard characterized by a deficiency of precipitation.

entities.name: FLOODS
entities.description: A type of natural hazard involving an overflow of water onto land.

entities.name: CYCLONES
entities.description: A type of natural hazard involving strong rotating wind systems.

entities.name: HAILSTORMS
entities.description: A type of natural hazard involving precipitation of ice pellets.

entities.name: VOLCANIC ERUPTIONS
entities.description: A type of natural hazard involving the release of magma and gas from a volcano.

entities.name: EARTHQUAKES
entities.description: A type of natural hazard involving sudden shaking of the ground.

entities.name: LANDSLIDES
entities.description: A type of natural hazard involving the movement of rock and debris down a slope.

entities.name: FOREST FIRE
entities.description: A type of natural hazard involving uncontrolled fires in wildland areas.

entities.name: LOCUST OUTBREAK
entities.description: A type of natural hazard involving massive infestations of locusts.

entities.name: CROPS
entities.description: Agricultural plants that are subject to failure due to natural hazards.

entities.name: ECOSYSTEMS
entities.description: Biological communities that can be destroyed by natural hazards.

entities.name: DISASTER MITIGATION STRATEGIES
entities.description: Approaches used to minimize the loss caused by natural hazards.

entities.name: EARLY WARNING SYSTEMS
entities.description: A component of disaster mitigation used to provide advance notice of hazards.

entities.name: COMMUNICATION SYSTEMS
entities.description: A component of disaster mitigation used to coordinate immediate action during disasters.

entities.name: DISASTER MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The overall process of warning, prevention, planning, preparedness, monitoring, assessment, and relief.
